title.en: As a result, it fell here for the sake of the H...

content.en:
A supreme path void demon like Blood Chaos, if he wants to break through to the sevenfold supreme realm, he can break through at any time.

As a result, it fell here for the sake of the Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian slaughtered all the remaining Supreme Dao Void Demons here, and this time he was not injured.

Immediately after, Ye Tian went to kill the other Supreme Dao Void Demons, and came directly to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield Void Passage.

If the other Supreme Path Void Demons wanted to leave the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, they had to leave through the Void Passage, and there was no other way.

And here in the Void Passage, there are also a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons stationed, except for a few Supreme Dao Void Demons who escaped in time, the others all died at Ye Tian's hands.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian sat here to prevent the other Supreme Dao Void Demons from leaving.

......

Imaginary domain.

Heavenly blood is an ancestral land.

An incomparably terrifying Supreme Dao Void Demon gathered.

"Something happened to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, and a fivefold Supreme Dao realm that took the path of the strongest to the Dao swept across the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, and even the children such as Blood Chaos and Zhan He were killed. "

"This kind of demon has appeared on the battlefield, the Innate Origin Domain is really excessive, he must be killed!"

"Who will you send?"

"Send the Blood Killer to go, he is the peak of the Sixfold Dao Realm, and his bloodline has reached the supreme level, no less than the Supreme Dao Realm who takes the path of the strongest Dao, although he has not comprehended the rules of the sixth sequence of the Dao, but his strength is not inferior to the top of the Eightfold Dao Realm, and his strength is enough to kill the other party. "

"Then let the Blood Killer withdraw from the other battlefields and enter the Heavenly Blood Battlefield. "

Soon, the Blood Killer got the news and went to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Originally, the Blood Killer looked down on a third-level battlefield like the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, but this was an order from the top of the Heavenly Blood Lineage, and he had to obey it.

Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Ye Tian killed some Supreme Dao Void Demons again, he had already become the number one on the Heavenly Blood Heavenly Dragon List, and had accumulated a lot of wealth and gifts from the Heavenly Emperor's origin.

If you go back to retreat, you can definitely raise your cultivation to the middle realm of the fivefold Dao realm.

"There is a supreme void demon who wants to enter the Heavenly Blood Battlefield!"

Ye Tian stood up, holding his weapon in his hand, waiting for the other party to come.

Wow!

A sixfold supreme Dao Void Demon descended, exuding a terrifying aura all over his body, much more terrifying than the Blood Order.

"Xeon Bloodline!"

He had heard that the Supreme Dao Void Demon Clan had a very small number of supreme bloodlines, similar to those powerhouses in the Innate Origin Domain who took the path of supreme strength to the Dao, and their combat power was about the same level.

And this Supreme Dao Void Demon with a supreme bloodline, the supreme path rules on his body are also extremely rich, and he has definitely reached the ten-percent realm, and he is at the level of comprehending the sixth sequence of supreme path rules.

Its strength is definitely not inferior to that of the Taibai Sword Master.

"I'm not an opponent!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This is a top-level third-level battlefield, and the strength of the sixfold Dao realm has not been suppressed much, so he still can't defeat this supreme Dao void demon.

Rumble!!!!!

After the Blood Killer saw Ye Tian, he directly conjured up a sea of blood.

This sea of blood is composed of the seventh sequence of supreme dao rules, and this is also a very terrifying seventh sequence supreme dao divine power - the bloody sea realm!

As soon as the Bloody Sea Realm comes out, if you can't comprehend the rules of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao, you really can't escape.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian directly burned the origin and used the Dao Flow Body Technique to break through the Blood Sea Realm.

I saw that Ye Tian was like a ray of light, with the help of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, he penetrated the Bloody Sea Realm barrier and barely penetrated the past.

But at this moment, bloody hands hit Ye Tian's body directly, and half of his body was directly shattered.

......

"Finally escaped!"

Ye Tian was extremely miserable at the moment, if he didn't rely on the Burning Origin and the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, his copy body would probably have fallen.

He didn't expect the Heavenly Blood of the Supreme Dao Void Demon to react so quickly, and he also sent such a terrifying Supreme Dao Void Demon.

It's not that he is reluctant to give up this replica body, but this replica body has collected a lot of resources, and if it falls, it will be a big loss!

And when he fled, he also summoned those Supreme Dao Realms in the Heavenly Dragon Domain, informed them of the situation, and let them escape as well.

If they scattered and fled, even if they were blood killers, they wouldn't be able to kill too many Supreme Dao Realms.

Soon.

Ye Tian fled to Heavenly Blood City No. 3, and then directly withdrew from the Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

And the blood killer killed all the way to the side of Heavenly Blood City No. 3, and directly destroyed Heavenly Blood City No. 3.

However, most of the Supreme Dao Realm withdrew from Heavenly Blood City No. 3.

And the Blood Killer didn't kill Ye Tian, he was very annoyed, and began to slaughter the other Dao realms on the Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

Soon, a sixfold supreme Dao realm powerhouse no less than the Blood Killer descended.

Heavenly Blood Battlefield.

"Blood Killer, quit the Heavenly Blood Battlefield!"

The unparalleled God descended here and stopped the bloody killer.

The Peerless Heavenly Lord was under the order of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and he came here to stop the Blood Killer, otherwise he would have to die too much in the Supreme Dao Realm.

"Peerless God, you can defeat me first!"

The two sides fought.

However, their strength is almost the same, and the rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme dao they have comprehended are all ten percent consummation, and they have all created a lot of seventh sequence supreme dao supernatural powers, and their combat experience is also extremely rich.

They fought for a long time, and they didn't know the winner.

However, after a period of time, the Heavenly Blood Pulse still let the Blood Killer withdraw, and the Peerless God also withdrew.

......

"Ye Tian, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance has issued an order, so that you are not allowed to enter the Heavenly Blood Battlefield!"

Ao Xun Longzun said.

"Oh, why?" Ye Tian asked.

Ao Xun Longzun said helplessly: "Your strength is too strong, if you enter the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, those Supreme Dao Void Demons can't be defeated, and they will inevitably send demons like Blood Killer, and when the time comes, we will have to die a large number of Heavenly Dragon Realm to the Dao Realm." Moreover, because of you, the Heavenly Dragon Domain has suffered heavy losses, and it has already made many Supreme Dao Realms dissatisfied!"

In fact, Ao Xun Longzun was also a little dissatisfied, but he didn't dare to say it, after all, he couldn't beat Ye Tian.

Ye Tian thought for a while and said, "Okay, I will withdraw from the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, but I have to absorb the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift, and the battle merits have to be exchanged for me, right?"

"Battle exploits!"

The corners of Ao Xun Longzun's mouth twitched, Ye Tian's combat exploits this time were too terrifying, if they were really all exchanged, how many resources would the Heavenly Dragon Domain have to lose!

So, he hurriedly said: "Ye Tian, it's okay for you to refine the Heaven and Earth Origin Gift, but if you have military merits, forget it, we will compensate you for some resources, how about it?"

"Okay!"

Ye Tian also sighed, after all, this is someone else's territory, what can he say?

Subsequently, he returned to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield again and directly absorbed the gift of the Heaven and Earth Origin.
